elements.content: Sheet: CAN Messages (4 rows x 7 cols)
Sheet: CAN Signals (5 rows x 10 cols)

tables.caption: Worksheet: ErrorCodes
rows: Open K2 contactor; damaged C21; blown F18 (250A); missing MotorRPM on 0x181; resolver failure
Verify F18 continuity; check K2; measure HV at C21 pins 1-2; monitor 0x181 MotorRPM; check resolver at C42 pins 1-4
Cooling pump failure; low coolant; blocked passages; CoolantTemp sensor; F21/K5 fault
Monitor CoolantTemp on 0x182; pump function test; verify F21/K5; check coolant level; inspect NTC on C42 pin 9
Loose C42 (pins 7-8); CAN wiring short/open; missing termination; ECU 12V supply fault
Check C42 pins 7-8; measure 60 Ohm termination; verify 12V at C42 pin 5; monitor 0x181/0x182/0x201
F21 blown (50A); K5 failure; pump inoperative; low coolant; air in system; radiator fan fault
Verify F21 continuity; actuate K5 via 0x201; monitor CoolantTemp on 0x182; inspect coolant; test fan at 85C
BMS communication fault; CAN signal corruption; cell imbalance; sensor drift
Read BatteryVoltage on 0x182; compare with C21 measurement; check CAN bus
Open circuit resolver winding; damaged C42 pins 1-4; MCU internal fault
Measure C42 pin 1-2 and 3-4 resistance (20-40 Ohm); inspect connector

tables.caption: Worksheet: DiagnosticMeasurements
rows: Inspect MCU for short before replacement

tables.caption: Worksheet: MaintenanceSchedule
rows: Fuse inspection (F18, F21), relay test (K2, K5)
Connector inspection (C21, C35, C42) - visual + torque

tables.caption: Worksheet: ECUList
rows: 12 V (VCU via C42 pin 5) + HV (355V via C21)

children.content: Open K2 contactor; damaged C21; blown F18 (250A); missing MotorRPM on 0x181; resolver failure
Verify F18 continuity; check K2; measure HV at C21 pins 1-2; monitor 0x181 MotorRPM; check resolver at C42 pins 1-4
Cooling pump failure; low coolant; blocked passages; CoolantTemp sensor; F21/K5 fault
Monitor CoolantTemp on 0x182; pump function test; verify F21/K5; check coolant level; inspect NTC on C42 pin 9
Loose C42 (pins 7-8); CAN wiring short/open; missing termination; ECU 12V supply fault
Check C42 pins 7-8; measure 60 Ohm termination; verify 12V at C42 pin 5; monitor 0x181/0x182/0x201
F21 blown (50A); K5 failure; pump inoperative; low coolant; air in system; radiator fan fault
Verify F21 continuity; actuate K5 via 0x201; monitor CoolantTemp on 0x182; inspect coolant; test fan at 85C
BMS communication fault; CAN signal corruption; cell imbalance; sensor drift
Read BatteryVoltage on 0x182; compare with C21 measurement; check CAN bus
